name: Broccoli and Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 cup canned mushrooms (straw or button), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the beef against the grain into thin strips. Combine with soy sauce, rice wine, and cornstarch. Set aside to marinate.
2. Chop green onion and ginger.
3. Mix all ingredients for the cooking sauce in a bowl.
4. Blanch broccoli and carrot slices in boiling water with a pinch of salt until they are slightly softened but still crunchy. Drain and set aside.
5. Heat a wok over high heat. Add 2 to 3 tablespoons oil. Stir-fry green onion and ginger until fragrant, then add the marinated beef. Stir-fry quickly until the meat changes color.
6. Pour in the cooking sauce and stir until thickened and bubbly.
7. Add the vegetables and mix well.
8. Serve over rice.
Note: For authentic Chinese cooking results, ensure a strong heat source is used. Preheat your stove to high or cook outdoors on a propane gas stove to minimize odors and smoke indoors.
